first-preview-deployment.prTitle: Your first preview deployment, created by the Vercel bot
first-preview-deployment.prBody:
#### Hello, I’m the Vercel bot.

- To update your Vercel Starter Kit, I created a new branch, pushed some changes, and opened this pull request.
- This creates a preview deployment on Vercel.

#### Next Step:

- Click “Visit Preview” on the table below to view the deployment.

> **Note:** You can still click “Visit Preview” while it’s “Building”. The page will auto-reload when it becomes “Ready”.
first-preview-deployment.commitMessage: Update text to talk about preview deployment

smaller-triangle.prComment:
#### We just pushed a new commit.

- This creates a new preview deployment, which will be accessible via the same URL.
- If you had commented on the preview deployment, the status of this pull request becomes ❌ (failing).
- This will be fixed when we resolve the comment.

#### Next Step:

- On the table above, wait until the status changes from “Building” to “Ready”.
- Then click “Visit Preview” again.

merge-comment.prComment:
#### We merged the pull request.

- This creates a new production deployment.

#### Next Step:

- [Click here to see the production deployment progress on the Vercel dashboard](https://vercel-site-git-chibicode-life-4346-create-a-demo-for-de-c94e2a.vercel.sh/{{teamSlug}}/{{projectName}}?starter-kit=done).
